overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a morning walk through Night City. The player character moves from a street with elevated metro tracks past futuristic skyscrapers, turns to admire a massive tower against the sunrise, then explores a derelict trash-filled encampment area.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with futuristic towers overhead

events.description: camera pans down from skyscrapers to street level

agents.ego_description: looking up at towering skyscrapers then panning down to street level

entered.detail: tall white and blue striped futuristic skyscraper with multiple tiers
low-rise red brick office building with dark tinted windows
modern glass high-rise building with reflective surface

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with a dramatic upward view of futuristic mega towers against a clear morning sky. The camera then pans down to street level, revealing a red brick office building and the beginning of a city sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk next to elevated metro track

events.description: crossing the street from sidewalk to sidewalk between moving vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to the metro track wall then crossing the street

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk
person walking in opposite direction along the metro wall

entered.detail: concrete retaining wall with elevated metro tracks above and graffiti markings
tall traffic signal pole with multiple lights

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow sidewalk bordered by a concrete metro wall on the left. After crossing between vehicles, the path continues toward a distant overpass with the red office building remaining visible on the right.

events.description: passing large digital billboard with glowing 24/7 SERVICE signage

agents.ego_description: walking toward the overpass intersection with moderate pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: woman in red top and shorts walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard displaying 24/7 SERVICE in blue and red neon
elevated highway or metro overpass crossing perpendicular to the street

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the sidewalk toward a large overpass, the character passes a prominent digital billboard advertising 24/7 service. Pedestrians walk in the same direction as the camera approaches the intersection beneath the elevated roadway.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection corner with view of mega tower

events.description: turning right at the intersection to face the mega tower
tilting camera upward to view the full height of the tower against the sun

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and looking up at the massive tower silhouetted against the morning sun

notable_agents.action: shirtless man with tattoos walking along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: At the intersection, the character turns right and tilts the camera up to admire a massive futuristic tower backlit by the morning sun. The overpass remains visible in the mid-ground while pedestrians walk along the wide sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: derelict makeshift camp with trash piles

events.description: entering dirt area with trash piles and makeshift camp from paved sidewalk
passing scavenger searching through garbage bags

agents.ego_description: walking through the derelict area examining the trash piles and makeshift shelters

notable_agents.action: scavenger crouching and searching through blue trash bags
woman standing near discarded couch wearing teal tank top

entered.detail: old brick warehouse building with broken windows and graffiti
large piles of blue and black garbage bags stacked along the path
improvised shelter made of tarps and cardboard boxes
abandoned couch and folding chair left on the dirt ground

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from paved sidewalk to a dirt path lined with piles of garbage bags and makeshift shelters. The character walks past a scavenger searching through trash and a woman standing near discarded furniture, with the mega tower now visible in the distant left background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the towering heights of a futuristic metropolis down into a gritty, derelict urban encampment. It begins with a dramatic upward gaze at mega towers against a clear morning sky before panning down to a street-level sidewalk beside a red brick office building. As the camera moves forward, the path narrows along a concrete metro wall and passes a glowing digital billboard, leading the viewer toward a large intersection beneath an elevated overpass. Upon reaching the intersection, the camera turns right and tilts upward to capture a massive tower backlit by the morning sun before shifting focus back to the ground. The scene finally transitions from the paved city sidewalk to a dirt path cluttered with garbage bags and makeshift shelters, moving past scavengers and discarded furniture with the distant towers lingering in the background.
